1-expert.prompt_text: Search Condition resources with SNOMED 23502006 (Lyme disease). Query: Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|23502006

1-naive.raw_response:
Here are FHIR queries to find patients with Lyme disease using common coding systems:

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|23502006&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.20&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.2&_include=Condition:patient
```

### Explanation:
| Query | Details |
|---|---|
| `SNOMED CT \| 23502006` | *Lyme borreliosis* (Lyme disease) — SNOMED preferred term |
| `ICD-10-CM \| A69.20` | *Lyme disease, unspecified* |
| `ICD-10-CM \| A69.2` | *Lyme disease* (parent/header code) |

### Notes:
- **`_include=Condition:patient`** retrieves the associated `Patient` resources in the same bundle.
- If you want to search across **all Lyme disease subcategories** (e.g., Lyme carditis `A69.21`, Lyme arthritis `A69.23`, neuroborreliosis `A69.22`), you could add those codes or use a broader text search:
  ```
  Condition?code:text=lyme&_include=Condition:patient
  ```
- You can also use **`Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=...`** if you want to return `Patient` resources directly.

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Lyme Disease Diagnosis

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|23502006&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.20&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.21&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.22&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.23&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.29&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

### Code Reference Table

| Code System | Code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **SNOMED CT** | `23502006` | Lyme disease (primary concept) |
| **ICD-10-CM** | `A69.20` | Lyme disease, unspecified |
| **ICD-10-CM** | `A69.21` | Meningitis due to Lyme disease |
| **ICD-10-CM** | `A69.22` | Other neurologic disorders in Lyme disease |
| **ICD-10-CM** | `A69.23` | Arthritis due to Lyme disease |
| **ICD-10-CM** | `A69.29` | Other conditions associated with Lyme disease |

### Notes
- **`_include=Condition:patient`** retrieves the associated `Patient` resources in a single call.
- The **SNOMED query** is the broadest and most semantically rich — use it when the EHR is SNOMED-encoded.
- **ICD-10-CM A69.2x** covers all manifestation-specific Lyme subtypes (neurological, arthritic, cardiac, etc.).
- You may optionally add **`&clinical-status=active`** to filter only active diagnoses.
1-broad.prompt_text: Find patients diagnosed with Lyme disease — tick-borne bacterial infection caused by Borrelia burgdorferi.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Query: Lyme Disease Conditions

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|23502006
```

### Query Breakdown

| Component | Value | Description |
|-----------|-------|-------------|
| **Resource** | `Condition` | Clinical condition/diagnosis resource |
| **Parameter** | `code` | Coded condition identifier |
| **System** | `http://snomed.info/sct` | SNOMED CT terminology system |
| **Code** | `23502006` | Lyme disease (Lyme borreliosis) |

### Notes
- **SNOMED 23502006** maps to *Lyme disease* (caused by *Borrelia burgdorferi*)
- This query returns **all patients** with a recorded Lyme disease condition
- To refine results, consider adding:
  - `&clinical-status=active` — only active diagnoses
  - `&verification-status=confirmed` — confirmed diagnoses only
  - `&subject=Patient/[id]` — for a specific patient
  - `&onset-date=ge2026-01-01` — onset after a specific date

### Extended Example
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|23502006&clinical-status=active&verification-status=confirmed
```

**Notes:**
- **RxNorm `3640`** is the standard ingredient-level code for **doxycycline**
- `status=active` filters to patients **currently on** the medication
- `_include=MedicationRequest:patient` / `_include=MedicationStatement:patient` pulls the associated **Patient** resources in the same bundle
- Both **MedicationRequest** (prescriptions) and **MedicationStatement** (patient/provider-reported use) are queried to ensure comprehensive coverage

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries for Doxycycline Prescriptions

**RxNorm code used:** `54543` — Doxycycline (ingredient-level, covers all formulations: hyclate, monohydrate, calcium salts, all doses/routes)

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|54543&_include=MedicationRequest:patient&_include=MedicationRequest:medication

MedicationDispense?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|54543&_include=MedicationDispense:patient&_include=MedicationDispense:medication

MedicationStatement?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|54543&_include=MedicationStatement:patient&_include=MedicationStatement:medication
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| Query | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `MedicationRequest` | Active/historical **prescriptions** ordered by clinicians |
| `MedicationDispense` | Doxycycline actually **dispensed/filled** at pharmacy |
| `MedicationStatement` | Patient-reported or imported **medication history** |

### Key Details
- **RxNorm `54543`** is the ingredient-level code, ensuring coverage of all brand/generic variants (Vibramycin, Doryx, Monodox, Acticlate, etc.) across all strengths (50 mg, 100 mg) and forms (capsule, tablet, IV, syrup)
- `_include=...:patient` returns matching **Patient** resources in the same bundle
- `_include=...:medication` resolves any **Medication** reference resources inline

> 💡 **Tip:** To narrow to active prescriptions only, append `&status=active` to the `MedicationRequest` query. To filter by date range, add `&authoredon=ge2025-01-01`.

## FHIR Query: MedicationRequest for Doxycycline (RxNorm 3640)

```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3640
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Resource Type** | `MedicationRequest` |
| **Search Parameter** | `code` |
| **Code System** | `http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm` |
| **RxNorm Code** | `3640` |

### 🧪 Server Coding Pattern
All 3 sampled records carry **exactly one medication code**: ingredient-level RxNorm `3640`. This server **normalizes** doxycycline to the ingredient atom — it does **not** store clinical-drug product codes (e.g., `1649988` = 100 MG Capsule hyclate). This is a common Synthea/EHR-on-FHIR pattern.

| Code level | RxNorm example | Server has it? |
|---|---|---|
| Ingredient | `3640` — doxycycline | ✅ **2,708 records** |
| Clinical drug (hyclate 100 MG cap) | `1649988` | ❌ 0 |
| Clinical drug (anhydrous 40 MG DR cap) | `901399` | ❌ 0 |
| IV injection (hyclate 100 MG) | `310027` | ❌ 0 |

---

### 💊 Doxycycline Salt/Formulation Family (VSAC-sourced, 34 codes)
Even though this server doesn't use them, here is the **complete product-level family** from `Doxycycline medications` (VSAC `2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1032.66`) across all 4 salt forms:

| Salt form | Key RxNorm codes |
|---|---|
| **Hyclate** | 283535 · 310027 · 310028 · 348869 · 406524 · 434018 · 1423080 · 1649405 · 1649425 · 1649988 · 1650143 · 1650446 · 1652674 · 1653433 · 1791505 · 1801138 · 1801142 · 1998483 · 799048 |
| **Monohydrate** | 700408 · 728207 · 757460 · 757466 · 835700 · 1649401 · 1649429 · 1649990 · 1650030 · 1650142 · 1650444 · 1652673 |
| **Anhydrous** | 901399 |
| **Calcium** | 310026 |

---

### ⚠️ Cross-Indication Warning (Heavy Use)
RxNorm `3640` is prescribed across **many unrelated indications** — all return together in this single query. If your cohort targets a *specific* indication, you must pair this with a **Condition filter**:

| Indication | Condition code to add |
|---|---|
| Lyme disease | `ICD-10 A69.20` / SNOMED `23502006` |
| Acne vulgaris | `ICD-10 L70.0` / SNOMED `11381005` |
| Chlamydia / STI | `ICD-10 A74.9` / SNOMED `16241000` |
| Community-acquired pneumonia | `ICD-10 J18.9` / SNOMED `233604007` |
| Malaria prophylaxis | `ICD-10 Z29.2` / SNOMED `14651001` |
| Rosacea | `ICD-10 L71.9` / SNOMED `398909004` |
| COPD exacerbation | `ICD-10 J44.1` / SNOMED `195951007` |

To narrow by indication, use a `_has` reverse chain, e.g., for **Lyme disease only**:
```
Patient?_has:MedicationRequest:patient:code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|3640
       &_has:Condition:patient:code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|A69.20
```
